# graphql/CreateEmailFinderExport

## Overview

Create an email finder export scheduler job via GraphQL jobs module. Maps to TKD Job endpoint `POST /api/v1/jobs/email-export` and processor `email_finder_export_stream`. Used by bulk export UX and jobs dashboard polling.

## GraphQL operation

```graphql
mutation CreateEmailFinderExport($input: CreateEmailFinderExportInput!) { jobs { createEmailFinderExport(input: $input) { jobId status createdAt } } }
```
